reason: Strict v1 produced zero trades before any payoff existed: 775 parent first revisits -> 3 M5 MSS -> 3 child zones -> 0 child-CE fills. This amendment is based only on the causal event-count funnel, not trade outcomes.
unchanged: all HTF root, first-sweep/reclaim, H1 structure-break, parent FVG/OB ancestry
first-touch freshness and parent delay policies
nested child FVG/OB and child-CE limit entry
structural stop, opposing unswept-liquidity target, costs and stop-first ambiguity
time and symbol holdouts, policy selection rule and success/failure gates

amended_m5_internal_structure.swing: strict 1-left/1-right internal fractal, available only after the right M5 bar closes; ties disqualify
amended_m5_internal_structure.recency: pivot must be after H1 parent confirmation OR within the 24 M5 bars before parent revisit
amended_m5_internal_structure.mss_window: first qualifying break within 12 M5 bars after parent first revisit
amended_m5_internal_structure.break: directional close >=0.05 M5 ATR through the latest causally confirmed unbroken swing; body >=0.60 M5 ATR; close-location >=0.65

amended_child.fvg: unchanged directional 3-candle gap >=0.10 M5 ATR; all three candles at/after parent revisit
amended_child.ob: unchanged last opposite-color full-range candle at/after parent revisit

holdout_rule: The v2 development policy is selected without inspecting v2 holdout payoffs. If no policy passes the original development feasibility gate, freeze P0_PRIMARY and report failure/inconclusive exactly as v1 specified.
